notes: Manual helper pushes the current branch to origin.
Manual helper stages and commits tracked changes.
Creates or refreshes the collateral extraction virtual environment.
Loads editable JSONL contract rows.
Loads the SQLite schema before inserting rows.

condition_text: git ls-files is required for tracked-file inventory
notes: Builder inventories tracked files from Git rather than the raw filesystem.
Appends selected and skipped scheduler decisions before any runner executes workspace work.
Reads manifest-driven field mapping and loss accounting for the selected downstream serializer.

condition_text: when a serializer maps work_type values
notes: Reads registry-controlled canonical work_type mappings instead of private exporter type maps.

condition_text: when exporting full-fidelity relationship predicate definitions
notes: Reads predicate labels, inverses, evidence rules, and export behavior for relationship predicates in json-full bundles.

condition_text: when exporting full-fidelity claim type definitions
notes: Reads claim type evidence rules, review requirements, export visibility, and confidence guidance for source_claim rows in json-full bundles.
Writes downstream serializer output. The export is derived, not canonical storage.

condition_text: one or more explicit --report paths, or discovered under --root
notes: Reads existing validator reports without invoking validators or mutating report artifacts.

condition_text: one or more explicit --adapter paths, or discovered under --root
notes: Reads source-adapter manifests and performs read-only local locator inspection without fetching, cloning, importing, or mutating sources.
Reads one validated knowledge-tree export JSON artifact as the content substrate for the static publish.
Reads one validated public presentation JSON artifact as the navigation and redaction-gate substrate for the static publish.
Writes the generated build manifest into the staged site before the publish directory is atomically swapped into place.
Writes the final static HTML/CSS site via staged output and atomic directory swap, restoring the previous publish directory if activation fails.
Reads the static-site build manifest as the authoritative inventory of public site files and validated source artifacts.
Reads only the declared public page and asset files when staging the outbound sharing bundle.
Writes a local-only sharing bundle directory containing public site files, sanitized metadata summaries, and a bundle manifest; no automatic upload occurs.
Reads an already-built local public sharing bundle and hashes the contained public artifacts for safekeeping handoff.
Writes a local-only safekeeping manifest describing Git/archive/manual preservation channels and artifact hashes without performing any remote upload.
Reads one generated static-site build manifest as the canonical route, asset, and input-fingerprint inventory.
Reads rendered HTML pages and assets to detect broken internal links, missing files, and freshness drift after publication.
Reads one validated local source-adapter manifest and resolves its local path inputs without mutating sources.
Emits a read-only planning payload describing candidates, skips, blockers, and handoff validation state.
Writes normalized handoff JSONL derived from the dry-run plan using atomic output writes.
Reads one validated local structured-data source-adapter manifest and resolves local file or directory inputs without mutating sources.
Emits a read-only planning payload describing parsed structured records, contextual parse diagnostics, skips, blockers, and handoff validation state.
Writes normalized per-record structured-data handoff JSONL derived from the dry-run plan without retaining raw payload values.
Reads one validated remote_url_manifest source-adapter manifest without fetching remote content.
Emits a read-only planning payload describing accepted manifest rows, rejected rows, blockers, and handoff validation state.
Writes configured-remote handoff JSONL derived from the local manifest snapshot without network access.
Reads one validated local_git_repo source-adapter manifest and inspects an already-local checkout without remote operations.
Emits a read-only planning payload describing repo state, candidate path scope, blockers, and handoff validation state.
Writes one per-snapshot local Git handoff JSONL record without cloning or fetching.
Checks availability of declared view-model schema contracts.
Reports fixture availability without mutating or regenerating fixtures.
Emits the current view-model catalog report JSON by default; text output is operator-only.
Reads one emitted product/API view-model JSON payload.
Loads the matching top-level schema contract from the view-model schema catalog.
Emits a machine-readable validation report JSON by default; text output is operator-only.
Loads canonical work_type mapping data for serializers and validators.
Loads policy data for retention-status validation, public export visibility, and quote eligibility.
Loads predicate data for strict relationship graph validation and full-fidelity export definitions.
Loads claim type data for strict claim validation and full-fidelity export definitions.

condition_text: when a selected profile has source_type_policy
notes: Strict export validation checks work_type registration and required downstream mappings.

condition_text: when validating canonical records with capture/extraction retention state
notes: Profile validation checks retention statuses and discard metadata against the effective rights/retention policy.
Strict graph validation checks source_relationship predicates and evidence requirements against the registry.
Strict claim validation checks source_claim claim_type values, evidence requirements, and human-review-required claim classes against the registry.
Uses source-type registry to identify provisional source types in the backfill report.
